channel.title: Distance Junkie: The Chase the Summit Podcast
channel.description: Distance Junky by Chase the Summit is a Podcast all about Trail and Ultra Running, Endurance Sports of all sorts, and all the Fitness Tech you can handle! We'll be talking about training, testing gear, and sharing our journey. Formerly known as the "Chase the Summit Trail Talk Podcast"

image.title: Distance Junkie: The Chase the Summit Podcast

channel.itunes:author: Dave Dillon
channel.itunes:summary: Distance Junky by Chase the Summit is a Podcast all about Trail and Ultra Running, Endurance Sports of all sorts, and all the Fitness Tech you can handle! We'll be talking about training, testing gear, and sharing our journey. Formerly known as the "Chase the Summit Trail Talk Podcast"
channel.itunes:subtitle: Distance Junky by Chase the Summit is a Podcast all about Trail and Ultra Running, Endurance Sports of all sorts, and all the Fitness Tech you can handle.
channel.itunes:keywords: Running, Ultramarathon, Fitness Tech, Tech, Wearables, GPS

item.title: EP21 - The Quantified Scientist (Rob ter Horst) - YouTube Talk, Weekly MRI’s, and Who makes the BEST Sleep Tracker?
item.itunes:title: EP21 - The Quantified Scientist (Rob ter Horst) - YouTube Talk, Weekly MRI’s, and Who makes the BEST Sleep Tracker?
item.description:
The Quantified Scientist (Rob ter Horst) joins me on the podcast today. It was a ton of fun to catch up with Rob and he's a super interesting guy with tons of knowledge in the science of fitness trackers! Watch the full conversation exclusive to YouTube members and Patreon members only! Also available on your favorite podcast platform!

Watch the video version of this episode here:
https://youtu.be/UsfX3My5NTQ

item.itunes:title: EP11 - Flashback Episode : 2019 Vermont 100 Endurance Race DNF
item.description:
The Vermont 100 has been cancelled for 2020, and 2021 so I thought it might be fun to go back in time and talk about my experience at my last time attending this race in 2019. Things didn't go quite as planned!
